task_completion.description: Access the Aerobridge admin panel and navigate to the relevant registries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent logged into the Django administration interface at http://localhost:8000/admin/.

task_completion.description: Identify the assigned Pilot's Company/Organization from the Persons registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent viewing the 'Persons' list or detail pages (specifically for John Skywalker and Sarah Fields) to find their linked Company/Organization.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct Operator to flight plan MIG-ERR-101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the edit page for flight plan 'MIG-ERR-101' with 'SkyHigh Services' selected in the Operator dropdown, or a Django admin success message indicating the change was saved.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct Operator to flight plan MIG-ERR-102.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the edit page for flight plan 'MIG-ERR-102' with 'AgriDrones Inc' selected in the Operator dropdown, or a Django admin success message indicating the change was saved.

task_completion.description: Assign the correct Operator to flight plan MIG-ERR-103.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the edit page for flight plan 'MIG-ERR-103' with 'SkyHigh Services' selected in the Operator dropdown, or a Django admin success message indicating the change was saved.

task_completion.description: Ensure no flight plans other than the 'MIG-ERR-' ones were modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows no evidence of the agent opening, editing, or saving any flight plans that do not start with 'MIG-ERR-'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Django admin panel, not terminal commands (like python manage.py shell) or direct SQLite database modifications.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually checked the Persons registry instead of using hardcoded knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: There must be visual evidence of the agent visiting the Persons section in the admin panel to look up the pilots before making the flight plan updates.

integrity.description: Verify the results come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI looks consistent with standard Django admin behavior (e.g., standard green success banners, correct dropdown UI) without signs of DOM manipulation or text editor mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating three specific flight plans in the Aerobridge admin panel. MIG-ERR-101 (Pilot: John Skywalker) must be assigned Operator 'SkyHigh Services'. MIG-ERR-102 (Pilot: Sarah Fields) must be assigned Operator 'AgriDrones Inc'. MIG-ERR-103 (Pilot: John Skywalker) must be assigned Operator 'SkyHigh Services'. No other flight plans should be modified.
